sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.57: Fallback MotoPress room mapping to local accommodation titles and CRM name/code matching.
  • 1.8.8.56: Read MotoPress reserved_accommodations/customer fields for room mapping and dry-run preview.
  • 1.8.8.55: Add MotoPress room-line dry-run reconcile preview with ready/duplicate/error counts.
  • 1.8.8.54: Add MotoPress room-mapping preview and unmatched-room counts before room-line import.
  • 1.8.8.53: Add first MotoPress import action for new booking headers only, skipping duplicates/incomplete rows.
  • 1.8.8.52: Add MotoPress dry-run summary counts and visible import-action scaffold.
  • 1.8.8.51: Add MotoPress dry-run import readiness analysis for duplicates and missing fields.
  • 1.8.8.50: Add MotoPress dry-run mapping preview to show CRM import shape beside raw remote rows.
  • 1.8.8.49: Clarify MotoPress sync role and add safe remote booking preview scaffold.
  • 1.8.8.48: Hide zero commission on calendar and add pre-run repair scan counts in Settings.
